overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a character walking through a dark, atmospheric landscape at night. The character traverses a riverside path, passes a glowing lantern, and continues into a narrow rocky valley under an overcast sky.

events.description: character becomes clearly visible walking along the path toward the camera view

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the riverside path approaching a lit lantern in the distance

entered.detail: dark water reflecting the cloudy night sky
tall rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the valley
large dark structure visible on the horizon
low wooden fence running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wide riverside landscape at night with rocky cliffs and distant ruins visible. The character walks along a dirt path bordered by a wooden fence, with calm water visible to the right. The sky is overcast with patches of moonlight breaking through the clouds.

events.description: character passes close to the lit lantern, casting warm orange light on the surroundings
path narrows and enters darker valley area away from the lantern light

agents.ego_description: character walking past the glowing lantern along the stone-walled path

entered.detail: low stone wall running parallel to the path
tall wooden post with a glowing warm lantern
broken wooden fence or barricade beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrower path bordered by a stone wall on the left, passing a glowing lantern that provides the primary light source. The wooden fence continues alongside as the path begins to narrow. After passing the lantern, the scene transitions into a darker valley with rocky cliffs becoming more prominent.

events.description: entering deep shadow between tall cliffs, visibility decreases significantly as lantern light fades

agents.ego_description: character walking through the dark valley with tall grass and rocky walls on both sides

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the right boundary of the valley
tall wild grass and vegetation lining the left side of the path
tall wild grass and vegetation lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues through a narrow, dark valley flanked by tall rocky cliffs on both sides. Tall grass lines the dirt path as the last light from the lantern fades behind. The sky is partially visible above the cliff walls, with the path leading deeper into the shadowy canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open riverside landscape at night into the claustrophobic depths of a dark rocky valley. It begins on a wide dirt path bordered by a wooden fence, where calm water and distant ruins sit under an overcast sky with patches of moonlight. As the character advances, the path narrows and the environment shifts, passing a glowing lantern that casts a brief, warm light against a stone wall. The scene then transitions into a darker corridor as the lantern's glow fades, and the open horizon is replaced by towering rocky cliffs that flank both sides of the trail. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the shadowy canyon, moving through tall grass beneath a sliver of visible sky.
